This enterprise, named 'Xuanqi 3D Technology,' possesses a business license that is a masterclass 'sci-fi manufacturing directory' gathering top-tier technologies: intelligent manufacturing equipment manufacturing, industrial robot manufacturing, integrated circuit chip design. The logical deduction instantly turned into a farce about high-altitude heavy industry: high up on the 20th floor of a high-end headquarters park office building, 2 geek bros holding over a million RMB claim to have built an 'industrial robot manufacturing plant' requiring heavy machine tools and assembly lines? Do they polish robotic arms on the 20th floor and then transport them down through the window using drones? The probe mercilessly deleted all exaggerated heavy-industry delusions like 'manufacturing' from the license. The truth is extremely clear and possesses typical micro tech studio characteristics: this is a 100% genuine 2-Employee High-Rise Industrial Design & 3D Printing Studio (a micro-tech team focusing on industrial design and 3D printing services). Their true core business is utilizing a few high-precision 3D printers in the office to help clients with industrial design and prototyping (3D printing services), occasionally taking on some chip design work (drawing blueprints or subcontracting). The official 'Electronic Manufacturing Entity' label is the most rigid misinterpretation of this brain-intensive 'high-altitude prototyping workshop.'
